title: Build review selectors, permission filters and action services
requirements: Add selectors for review dashboard counters, issue queue, issue detail, index health list and search document detail.
Return ReviewQueueItem projection objects for unified issue/index queue lists without persisting ReviewCase.
Apply server-side visibility filters for source, source object, search document and access audit.
Add services for acknowledge, assign, request expert review, resolve, ignore, reopen and comment.
Add services for dry-run reindex request, enqueue reindex, retry failed index and delete stale index records.
Every state-changing service must write MemoryReviewAction.
Services must reject force-index for secret_blocked documents.
